div.p:
The First Committee of the United Nations General Assembly met on October 3 from 10:45 a. m. to 12:55 p. m.; for the record, see
United Nations document A/C.1/SR.350. The Indian Representative (Rau) expressed his Government’s doubts concerning the wisdom of authorizing United Nations Forces to cross the 38th Parallel and indicated that India would abstain in the First Committee from voting on either the eight-power or five-power draft resolutions.
